recommendations.overview: Over the course of five social occasions, a committed bachelor must consider the notion that he may have discovered love.

recommendations.title: The Guernsey Literary & Potato Peel Pie Society
recommendations.overview: Free-spirited writer Juliet Ashton forms a life-changing bond with the delightful and eccentric Guernsey Literary and Potato Peel Pie Society, when she decides to write about the book club they formed during the occupation of Guernsey in WWII.

recommendations.title: Unbroken

recommendations.title: First They Killed My Father
recommendations.overview: A 5-year-old girl embarks on a harrowing quest for survival amid the sudden rise and terrifying reign of the Khmer Rouge in Cambodia.
